case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LOBO, VERONICA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-13-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-12-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOBO, VERONICA $465.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $490.87, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-07-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-16-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-18-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-13-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS & PROOF OF PAYMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $465.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LOBO, VERONICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOBO, VERONICA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-18-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-18-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-16-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-18-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
